'''lavowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sialogog|sialogog]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sialogog|sialogog]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lavowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læveweth|læveweth]] || [[word:lævewej|lævewej]] || [[word:lævewesh|lævewesh]] || [[word:lævewe|lævewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lavovowoth|lavovowoth]] || [[word:lavovowoj|lavovowoj]] || [[word:lavovowosh|lavovowosh]] || [[word:lavovowo|lavovowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lavowoth|lavowoth]] || [[word:lavowoj|lavowoj]] || [[word:lavowosh|lavowosh]] || [[word:lavowo|lavowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lavofwofth|lavofwofth]] || [[word:lavofwofj|lavofwofj]] || [[word:lavofwofsh|lavofwofsh]] || [[word:lavofwof|lavofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lavowotho|lavowotho]] || [[word:lavowojo|lavowojo]] || [[word:lavowosho|lavowosho]] || [[word:lavowoko|lavowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lavowoth|lavowoth]] || [[word:lavowoj|lavowoj]] || [[word:lavowosh|lavowosh]] || [[word:lavowo|lavowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lavowothol|lavowothol]] || [[word:lavowojol|lavowojol]] || [[word:lavowoshol|lavowoshol]] || [[word:lavowokol|lavowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lavowoothotho|lavowoothotho]] || [[word:lavowoojojo|lavowoojojo]] || [[word:lavowooshosho|lavowooshosho]] || [[word:lavowooko|lavowooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lavowothon|lavowothon]] || [[word:lavowojon|lavowojon]] || [[word:lavowoshon|lavowoshon]] || [[word:lavowokon|lavowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lavowothooro|lavowothooro]] || [[word:lavowojooro|lavowojooro]] || [[word:lavowoshooro|lavowoshooro]] || [[word:lavowokooro|lavowokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
